variants.title: HiFi Filter SAH 01B04SDM001 Complete Air Filter

variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAH 01B04SDM001 Complete Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAH 01B04SDM001 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: COMPLETE AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 185.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 125.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 112.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 280.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 255.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 206.0 mm
